title: Dating a Vampire is Hard (Apparently)
description: Lily thought the cute mysterious boy at the late-night cafe was just shy. Turns out he's a 300 year old vampire and now she's accidentally his first ever girlfriend. He doesn't know how dates work. He keeps trying to pay with old coins. And someone older and scarier than him does NOT approve of humans. Cute, messy, and a little bit dangerous.

chapters.title: The Boy Who Never Ordered Anything
